calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Peter Busch, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Arati Vasan, of the Asian Pacific Islander Legal Outreach, Esq. for and with Petitioner: Maria Bollozos.

Respondent: Justin Michael Brown present in pro per.

The Parties were sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person: Maria Bollozos and her Residence.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Attack, Strike, Stalk, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Harass, Destroy The Personal Property Of, Or Disturb The Peace Of The Person.

Respondent shall not contact the person, either directly or indirectly, in ANY way, including, but not limited to, in person, by telephone, in writing, by public or private mail, by interoffice mail, by e-mail, by text message, by fax, or by any other electronic means.

Respondent shall not take any action to obtain the person's address or location.

No Guns or Other Firearms.

Expires: May 16, 2015.

Order signed in open court.
